'''Howzmin''' was a loyal servant of [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]], and was short, squat, and bald [[Human/Legends|Human]]. He was given the task of arranging the meeting between Xizor and [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. With the assistance of [[Guri]], Howzmin secured the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] disguises for Leia ([[Boushh/Legends|Boushh]]) and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] ([[Snoova]]). He had a paging device implanted in his head. Shortly before Chewbacca's escape from Xizor's palace, he was seen on the floor by Leia.

{{Char-stub}}
